safe_draft_preview_scenarios.title: Preview draft values against a local disposable PDF copy
Show missing, stale, or conflicting draft fields before a user acts
allowed_operations: compare fixture facts to required draft fields
block consequential actions until exact confirmation

blocked_consequential_actions.consumer_language: I can prepare a draft preview, but I cannot submit, certify, or make an official permit request. Review the draft in an attended session and confirm the exact submission action yourself.
I can describe required upload staging and file rules, but I cannot upload private documents or write files into DevHub. Uploads require the user to be present and to confirm the exact action.
I cannot enter payment details or execute a payment. Fee payment remains a separate attended financial workflow with exact user confirmation.
